description: Implement ledger router and writer governance contract per roadmap item 11. Create governance/ledger_routing_contract.md to establish routing logic, writer path specification, and next actor governance rules for the ledger exchange system.
routing_decision_basis: Following roadmap sequence after completed UNIVERSAL-EXECUTOR-AUDITOR-EXCHANGE-LEDGER-LOOP, next required item is LEDGER-ROUTER-LEDGER-WRITER-NEXT-ACTOR-GOVERNANCE-CONTRACT
